question:
Will Cuba win Miss Universe 2025?

Description: The Miss Universe 2025 competition is scheduled to be held in Thailand on November 21, 2025. You can find more information about that here: https://www.missuniverse.com/the-competition-thailand/

This market will resolve according to the listed country represented by the contestant that wins this competition. 

If the result of this competition isn't known by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on official results as reported by the Miss Universe Organization.

evidences.content: # Miss Universe Press Release ##### SHARE THIS ### Official Statement Regarding the Misuse of an Internal Communication The Miss Universe Organization (MUO) has been informed of the public circulation and misuse of an official letter dated October 29, 2025, originally issued exclusively to confirm a temporary authorization granted to the company Are One Inc., represented by Mr. Julio César Cruz, as franchisee for Miss Universe Cuba. MUO wishes to clarify that the aforementioned letter was strictly intended for internal and sponsorship-related purposes associated with the organization and promotion of the 74th Miss Universe Competition. It was not authorized for public release, media distribution, or representation in any context beyond those specific functions. [...] Furthermore, the Miss Universe Organization clarifies that no agreement, negotiation, or contract related to the 75th Miss Universe Competition (2026) has been issued, signed, or authorized. Any document or communication claiming such authorization shall be deemed invalid. The Organization strongly warns against unscrupulous individuals or entities who might attempt to use this letter or its contents for personal or...

evidences.title: Here's When & Where to Watch the 2025 Miss Universe Pageant in the U.S. - Remezcla
evidences.content: For audiences in the United States, the 2025 Miss Universe pageant will be available to stream via Telemundo and Peacock on Nov. 20. But you won’t have to get up early to watch it. Instead, the finals will take place at 8 a.m. in Thailand on Nov. 21. That means coverage will begin at 8 p.m. ET/ 7 p.m. CT/5 p.m. PT in the U.S. on Nov. 20. Preliminary coverage on Telemundo starts an hour before the show. The contest will be held at the exhibition and convention center Impact Challenger Hall in Pak Kret, Nonthaburi, Thailand. Carlos Adyan, Danilo Carrera, Jessica Carrillo, and Jacqueline Bracamonte will be the hosts. [...] And if you’re interested in the preliminary and National Costume Competitions, those will be airing Wednesday, November 19. They will be livestreamed on the Telemundo App, the @telemundoentretenimiento YouTube and Telemunfo Al Día FAST Channels. It will be at 1 p.m. Thailand time. That’s 1 a.m. ET. ### Miss Mexico Fátima Bosch Wins Miss Universe 2025 Miss Universe 2025 has been at the center of controversy this year, after Miss Mexico Fátima Bosch was called “dumb” by pageant executive Nawat Itsaragrisil during a pre-competition event that was streamed live on th...

evidences.content: There has been confusion about the event's date due to the 12-hour time difference between the U.S. and Thailand, where the pageant is being held this year. The event will take place at 8 a.m. on Friday, Nov. 21, in Thailand. That means the event will take place on Nov. 20 in the U.S. ## How to watch the 2025 Miss Universe finale The Miss Universe will be broadcast live by Telemundo in the U.S., according to the competition's website. Telemundo's broadcast will also be available on Peacock. The Miss Universe website states that fans in countries not on the competition's broadcast list can watch the event on the pageant's YouTube page. ## What is the Miss Universe preliminary competition for? How is the winner chosen? [...] # How to watch the 2025 Miss Universe grand finale tonight, Nov. 20 It's almost time to crown the 74th Miss Universe. The competition's finale is being held in Thailand, and will air in the United States on Thursday, Nov. 20. Contestants from 130 nations are celebrating the event's theme – "The Power of Love" – by joining forces to recognize a "shared vision of compassion, inclusivity, and strength," according to the event's website. evidences.title: Is Cuba Returning to Miss Universe After 57 Years?
evidences.content: Cuba’s history with Miss Universe dates back to 1952, a time when the nation was a participant in the pageant. The competition was banned in Cuba in 1960 due to political and financial tensions tied to a U.S. embargo against Cuba, leading to a 57-year hiatus. However, between 1961 and 1967, beauty queens participated in the pageant as “Miss Cuba Free.” Recent developments, including the emergence of the new Miss Universe Cuba account on Instagram and Anne Jakrajutatip’s expressed interest in visiting Cuba, hint at a potential return for Cuba. [...] The Caribbean nation of Cuba has not participated in the Miss Universe beauty pageant in 57 years. But recently, social media posts on the alleged “official” Miss Universe Cuba Instagram account started popping up, sparking rumors of a possible return to the competition. This year’s Miss Universe pageant is set to take place on Saturday, September 2024, in Mexico. [...] The 2024 Miss Universe pageant is set to be the most diverse yet. It’s the first to take place after the elimination of the age limits, which means any woman over 18 can participate. The 2023 pageant already made history, with the first married women and mothers partic...

evidences.title: Lina Luaces, Lili Estefan's daughter, was crowned Miss Universe Cuba 2025
evidences.content: The excitement grew for Lina's family and fans, who first saw her walk in a swimsuit and evening gown. Then, she was chosen for the Top 10, moved on to the final five, and was ultimately crowned the new Miss Cuba. During the competition, Lina was also honored with the Miss Press award. A crowned woman in a green gown holds flowers, flanked by two men and a woman, all smiling on stage. Meanwhile, Vanessa Villareal placed third, and Lisbeth Fernández was named first runner-up. Alongside the contestants, the three finalists answered the judges' questions in an event hosted by Carlos Adyan, Tenay Rodríguez, and Miss Universe 2023, Sheynnis Palacios. [...] As she prepares for the upcoming Miss Universe pageant, Lina Luaces joins a distinguished group of Latina contestants who their respective countries have already selected to compete in this highly anticipated event set to take place in Thailand. Among her fellow contestants are Aldana Massetfrom Argentina, Maria Gabriela Lacerda representing Brazil, Yessica Hausermannof Bolivia, Mirna Alejandra Caballinifrom Panama, Karla Bacigalupo of Peru, and Stephany Abasali of Venezuela. evidences.title: Miss Universe Press Release | Miss Universe
evidences.content: November 18, 2025 — New York, United States In light of recent public statements and social media posts, the Miss Universe Organization considers it necessary to clarify certain inaccuracies regarding the Beyond the Crown Program and the official judging processes of the Seventy Four Miss Universe competition. On 17 November, the Miss Universe Organization publicly released the official selection committee of the Beyond the Crown Program, an independent social impact initiative designed to promote leadership, service, education, health, inclusion, and meaningful support for charitable causes. This program operates entirely separately from the Miss Universe competition and from the official judging panel. evidences.title: Miss Universe Organization Reaffirms Board Autonomy and Strengthens Commitment to Transparent Governance | Miss Universe
evidences.content: New York, NY — April 23, 2025 — The Miss Universe Organization (MUO), a globally recognized leader in pageantry and women’s empowerment, today reaffirms that all decisions concerning leadership appointments, board composition, and organizational governance are made exclusively by the MUO Board of Directors. This Board is a fully independent and autonomous body, operating under our bylaws and guided solely by MUO’s mission and values—without influence from any external entity, including JKN Global Group. Unwavering Independence [...] Unwavering Independence We maintain clear structural and legal separation between our Board and any external shareholders or partners. This independence ensures that MUO’s governance remains transparent, consistent, and fully aligned with our purpose: empowering women around the world. We extend heartfelt thanks to contestants, partners, sponsors, and fans worldwide for their unwavering support. Your trust propels us forward as we celebrate diversity, showcase talent, and create transformative opportunities for women everywhere. [...] ### MORE news # Miss Universe Press Release # Miss Universe Press Release # Miss Universe Press Release # Miss Univer...

evidences.content: Hosted by American comedian Steve Byrne, with commentary from former titleholders Dayanara Torres (Miss Universe 1993) and R'Bonney Gabriel (Miss Universe 2022), the ceremony will see reigning champion Victoria Kjær Theilvig of Denmark crown her successor. Thai musician Jeff Satur will add a local flair with a special performance, aligning with the theme "The Power of Love." [...] Excitement is high as betting odds and fan buzz highlight several favorites. Miss Mexico, Fátima Bosch leads online support, praised for her charisma, while Miss Costa Rica, Mahyla Roth, has gained attention following her standout performance at the welcome ceremony. Miss Côte d'Ivoire's Olivia Yace is a strong contender due to her stunning presence and energy, and Miss Argentina, Aldana Masset, is also trending among enthusiasts. This year introduces a new twist with Miss Universe Latina, selected via Telemundo's reality show, representing Hispanic and Latina Americans. evidences.title: Miss Cuba, Lina Luaces, took off to Thailand to compete in the Miss Universe 2025
evidences.content: Lina arrived at the airport wearing a white mini-dress that showed off her long legs and highlighted her waist with a charming touch representing her homeland: Cuba’s national flower. The 23-year-old’s look also featured a white cape with structured shoulders, giving her outfit perfect symmetry and flow as she walked. Miss Universe Cuba 2025 Lina Luaces. She completed the look with platform heels and a chic French-style beret perched over her dark hair — which she teased would gradually lighten — styled in perfect waves. Of course, her Miss Universe Cuba sash was the finishing touch. evidences.title: Miss Universe 2025: Everything to Know and How to Watch
evidences.content: ## When will the 2025 Miss Universe pageant take place? Image 11: Miss Puerto Rico Ashley Carino, Miss Haiti Mideline Phelizor, Miss Australia Monique Rile, Miss Dominican Republic AndreÃÂ­na MartÃÂ­nez and Miss Lasos Payengxa Lor attend The 71st Miss Universe Competition at New Orleans Morial Convention Center:max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(734x195:736x197):format(webp)/miss-universe-age-091323-3-d0139ce84d3549f689d283ad5ada071e.jpg) Miss Universe contestants at the Miss Universe competition in 2023. Jason Kempin/Getty The 2025 Miss Universe pageant will take place at 8 a.m. in Thailand on Nov. 21, meaning that television coverage for US viewers hoping to tune in will begin at 8 p.m. ET on Nov. 20 (the day before in the US). [...] Hosting the English-language broadcast of the pageant is American comedian Steve Byrne, who will be joined by Puerto Rican actress and 1993 Miss Universe pageant winner Dayanara Torres, as well as R'Bonney Gabriel, who won the pageant in 2022, serving as additional commentary hosts. Carlos Adyan, Danilo Carrera, Jessica Carrillo, and Jacqueline Bracamonte will host the Spanish-language broadcast. ## Who will judge the 2025 Miss Universe pageant...

evidences.title: Every Winner in Miss Universe History From the Past 70 Years
evidences.content: ### American Miss Universe winners Miss USA 1954 Miriam Stevenson is remembered as the first American to win the Miss Universe title and the only one who received a tied final score — she disputed the crown with Martha Rocha of Brazil. Both faced a last decisive round in the competition, and Stevenson ended up securing the title due to having a “better physique” for what Catalina Swimwear was looking for. Here’s the complete list: ### Every winner in the Miss Universe history: ## Miss Universe 1952 Armi Kuusela Miss Universe 1952, miss Armi Kuusela, first miss universe, Miss Universe 1952, miss Armi Kuusela, first miss universe, Miss Universe 1952 Armi Kuusela ## Miss Universe 1953 Christiane Martel [...] ## Miss Universe 2021 Harnaaz Sandhu Miss India, Harnaaz Sandhu, Miss Universe 2021, Miss India, Harnaaz Sandhu, Miss Universe 2021, Miss Universe 2021 Harnaaz Sandhu ## Miss Universe 2022 R’Bonney Gabriel Miss USA, R'Bonney Gabriel, Miss Universe 2022, Miss USA, R'Bonney Gabriel, Miss Universe 2022, Miss Universe 2022 R’Bonney Gabriel ## Miss Universe 2023 Sheynnis Palacios Miss Universe 2023, Sheynnis Palacios, Miss Nicaragua Sheynnis, Winner, Crown, Dress. evidences.title: Miss Universe Organization Announces Official Broadcasters for the 74th Miss Universe Pageant to be held in Bangkok at the Impact Challenger on November 19 & 21. | Miss Universe
evidences.content: # Miss Universe Organization Announces Official Broadcasters for the 74th Miss Universe Pageant to be held in Bangkok at the Impact Challenger on November 19 & 21. ##### SHARE THIS Bangkok/Manila, October 22, 2025 – The Miss Universe Organization is pleased to announce that ABS-CBN Corporation, Philippines, has renewed its partnership as the official broadcaster for the 74th Miss Universe pageant in the Philippines under a multi-year contract, covering the grand finale. Additionally, we are thrilled to welcome AIS PLAY as the official broadcaster for the first time in Thailand, signing on to stream all three events: the National Costume, the Preliminary Competition, and the Finale. USA NOVEMBER 20, 2025 9:52 AM EST [...] Let’s take a look at the winners who have made history from today to 1952! ### 2024 – Victoria Kjaer Theilvig (Denmark) Crowned on November 16, 2024, in Mexico City, she became the first Danish woman to win Miss Universe. Victoria is an animal rights activist and an entrepreneur in the jewelry industry. Victoria Kjær Theilvig© Rodrigo Varela ### 2023 – Sheynnis Palacios (Nicaragua) Crowned on November 18, 2023, in El Salvador, Sheynnis made history as the first Nicaraguan to win the crown.
